description: 'Where to ask questions, file bugs, and contribute to Roomful.'

## Join the project

- GitHub: [github.com/erayates/roomful](https://github.com/erayates/roomful)
- Issues: [github.com/erayates/roomful/issues](https://github.com/erayates/roomful/issues)
- Discussions: [github.com/erayates/roomful/discussions](https://github.com/erayates/roomful/discussions)
- Contributing: [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/erayates/roomful/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- Code of Conduct: [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](https://github.com/erayates/roomful/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)

## Support

- Use GitHub Discussions for implementation questions and API design feedback.
- Use GitHub Issues for bugs, regressions, or documentation gaps.
- Follow the contribution guide before opening a pull request so local quality checks match CI.
